prerequisites: A Canny account with admin access to your company's settings (the secret API key lives under Admin Settings > API).
Your Canny secret API key, retrieved from your company settings, to provide as the connector's required api_key field.

authMethods.name: Secret API key
authMethods.summary: Canny authenticates every request with your secret API key. Provide it in the connector's required api_key field. Canny expects the key as a POST parameter named apiKey (for example, curl https://canny.io/api/v1/boards/list -d apiKey=YOUR_API_KEY). The key is secret, so store it securely and do not share it.

setupSteps.title: Get your secret API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Canny with an admin account and open your company settings at Admin Settings > API (https://canny.io/admin/settings/api). Copy the secret API key shown there. Keep it private; Canny notes the key is secret and should be stored on your server and not shared.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the secret API key into the connector's required api_key field. Canny includes this key in requests as a POST parameter named apiKey, which authenticates all API calls against your company's data.
